notes: MemberList gains onCancelInvite?: (pubkey: string) => Promise<void> prop. MemberListItem renders an inline Cancel button (data-testid: cancel-invite-{pk.slice(0,8)}) gated on isPending && !isYou && onCancelInvite !== undefined. Chakra Modal confirmation shown on click with cancelInviteTitle/Body/Confirm strings; Confirm button has isLoading state. groups.tsx adds useToast, ChatSendMessageCapture (null-render inside ChatStoreProvider to capture sendMessage via ref), onCancelInvite callback that calls cancelPendingInvitation with sendAnnouncement and shows success/race/error toasts. All ACs (CPI-18 through CPI-21) verified. No blocking issues.
